description: The SunflowerApp project is open in Android Studio. Users have requested the ability to search and filter the plant list. Implement a search feature that allows users to filter plants by name, description, or grow zone number. The search must update the displayed list in real-time as the user types and show all plants when the query is empty. The feature should be integrated into the main activity layout. Login credentials: user 'ga', password 'password123'. Ensure the project compiles after all changes.
